summary: Elric and Sean, two friends who have not seen each other in 7 years, encounter each other on a mountain. Elric is suspended from using magic after falling down, and Sean tries to get him back up while they reminisce about their past friendship. However, their conversation is interrupted by monsters attacking them, and they are forced to fight for survival.
key_moments: Elric falls down and gets suspended from using magic
Sean tries to help Elric back up the mountain
Monsters attack Sean and Elric while they try to escape
